verified_assertions.evidence: init exported + DOMContentLoaded listener registered (or microtask fallback if already loaded)
showError() makes #error-banner visible and writes message; setPanelEmpty wipes loading states
renderUpcoming detects empty schedule and calls setPanelEmpty with 'No games scheduled in the next 7 days.'
updateTimestamp writes YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM into #last-updated and sets datetime attr
Empty schedule -> setPanelEmpty with 'No games' copy
renderSparkline produces inline SVG <polyline> per team

Requires real browser load + live data
Requires real browser load + live data

blurb: Outcome: shipped app.js — init() exports + bootstraps on DOMContentLoaded. Parallel data fetch via Promise.all; renderRankings (6 div tables + 2 wild-card lists), renderTrends (sparkline SVG + record + run diff + streak per team), renderUpcoming (date-grouped game rows). Error state shows banner + wires retry button. Empty schedule shows 'No games scheduled' copy.
